items.text:
🎭 FROM UNKNOWN TO ALMOST PLAYING KATNISS IN THE HUNGER GAMES TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
Hey there, my name is Freya Tingley. 

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including series regular roles in two NETFLIX series and lead roles in six feature films. I starred in JERSEY BOYS directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 with no connections to the industry.

Just a few years later, I made it all the way down to the final few girls for Katniss Everdeen in The Hunger Games.

For a kid from Australia with no connections, that felt impossible.

By 17, I had signed with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood. At 18, I moved to LA and within three months booked a series regular role on a NETFLIX show.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see are the years of hard work, rejection, persistence, and the strategy behind every step I took to move forward.

Lately, I’ve been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS FEELING STUCK AND NOT KNOWING WHAT TO DO TO CHANGE IT.

You train.
You get your materials together.
You’re told to “get an agent.”

But then…

You get an agent and nothing happens.
Or you don’t have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room.

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A private 2-hour, 1:1 career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:
• The one skill actors really need to book work - and how to tell if you actually have it
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t yet have an agent
• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions
• Why actors audition but still don’t book
• The materials you actually need (and what most actors get wrong)
• How to create more opportunities for yourself
• Plus much more

THE OUTCOME IS YOU WALK AWAY WITH NO MORE CONFUSION, NO MORE FEELING STUCK - BECAUSE YOU WILL HAVE CONFIDENCE IN KNOWING EXACTLY WHAT TO DO NEXT.

If you’re ready to commit to moving forward, comment COMMIT below or send me a DM 🤍

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text: Best agency for over 16s? One that gets you the most work. Singing acting dancing in that order….

topComments.text:
Agencies don't get you work...they get you opportunities...
I suggest you look at agencies that have both adult and child divisions...as a 16 year old they will be in a child division and get Spotlight through their agent...but will move on to adults soon...
May I suggest you join Children's Acting, Modelling, Casting Calls & FREE Advice for Parents UK which has a list of recommended reputable agencies in featured posts...and you concentrate on those with adult divisions too... At this age it will mainly be acting work...
The amount of work depends on not just the agent but also the person they are representing and what clients are looking for

items.text:
ISO: Supporting Actors/Background Extras for a funeral scene in a dark comedy. (Especially age 40-50+!!!) 

 

Logline: A closeted cam model accidentally gets a vibrator stuck in his bum on the day of his estranged father's funeral, and must contend with the things he keeps inside - literally and metaphorically - as they betray him. 

 

Location: St. Thomas the Apostle Church, Finsbury Park, London 

 

Dates: June 8-10. June 9 and 10 especially important! 

 

Looking for as many background actors as possible, non-speaking roles, to fill out the space in this tense, absurd scenario at a family funeral. This is my graduate thesis project for my MA at London Film School. 

 

Must bring "funeral appropriate attire" - semi-formal, or simply dark, muted colors, like you're dressing for a job interview. 

 

This is an unpaid opportunity due to our budget constraints, but it's a great chance to watch some serious professionals work! Food and transportation costs will be covered. 

If interested, reply here, or on Instagram @stuck.shortfilm2026, or via email studer.sam@pm.me

topComments.text: I’m interested and not the first funeral scenes filmed

items.text:
📍 UGC PERFORMER — TIKTOK AD SHOOT (LONDON)
British accent required. No formal acting experience needed — looking for natural, confident people comfortable on camera. Scenes will involve everyday lifestyle and street-style shooting.

🎭 Playing age: 18–30

🎬 Appearance: White / European Descent

🗣 Accent: British

📍 Location: London-based only

Contract type: Non-Union

Contract info:

Full buyout and usage rights for commercial social media advertising (TikTok and related platforms, approx. 12 months usage per project). By applying, you confirm acceptance of these terms.

💰 Fees:

• Half day (approx. 4 hours) — £80

• Full day (approx. 8 hours) — £160

📅 Shoot dates: 26–29 May (talent only required for ONE day)

⏰ Shoot duration: 4 or 8 hours depending on project

🕒 Exact timing TBC — production can arrange around performer availability.

Project info:

Ongoing roster call. Selected talent will be added to our talent pool and contacted for upcoming TikTok/social media shoots on a rolling basis. Shoots take place in London.

To apply, please send:

• Headshot

• UGC profile/previouse work

• If you do not have any previous work plese send a short self-tape (around 20 seconds introducing yourself naturally to camera)

📩 Apply to: [sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

items.text:
Casting Call
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

Currently casting for two roles:

Ahmed - a Palestinian villager (40s-60s)

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter.

We will have a preview show on 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe 12-14th August and later Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals start ASAP in Stratford and will take place predominantly on Sundays.

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply

items.text:
Hey guys!! Happy Summer!!! Classes are now open for June! We teach the business part other classes leave out - how to get repped once you're ready for rep, how to make sure your headshots are working for you, how to expand rep into other markets, etc -- all while doing a deep dive into TV, film, and commercial. We also offer incredible, informative VO classes for actors wanting to get into voice work!  Would love to have you with us for June! Teachers have all been working in the business for 10+ years professionally. Come learn from Film/Commercial Casting Directors, NYC/LA agents, and VO casting professionals!

To learn more about the classes we offer, please visit: www.sarahdowlingcasting.com/actors

To register or ask any questions, please email us at: SarahDowlingCasting@gmail.com

Thanks!

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

sharedPost.text:
La danse que je pratique n’est pas un simple mouvement.  
C’est une mémoire du corps, un langage invisible.

Même les gestes les plus simples portent quelque chose de profond.  
Ils peuvent libérer, réparer, ou faire remonter ce qui est caché.

La danse ancestrale ne s’explique pas.  
Elle se vit… et elle transforme.

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

items.text:
Allen Athletinnen und Athleten der neuen Staffel von Ninja Warrior Germany wünsche ich von Herzen alles Gute, maximale Konzentration, starke Nerven und genau den Mut, den es braucht, wenn aus Training plötzlich dieser eine entscheidende Moment vor Kamera, Publikum und Parcours wird.

Was mich an diesem Format seit Jahren fasziniert, ist die Mischung aus Sprungkraft, Griffkraft, Explosivität, Technik, Ausdauer, Willen und mentaler Stärke. Genau diese Verbindung aus Vorbereitung, Timing, Präzision und Leidenschaft kenne ich aus meiner eigenen Arbeit als Filmproduzent, Kameramann, Regisseur, Cutter, Content Creator, Darsteller und Gründer der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion Köln.

Bei Ninja Warrior Germany zählt nicht nur, wer stark ist. Es zählt, wer im richtigen Augenblick fokussiert bleibt, wer unter Druck klar denkt, wer trotz Risiko sauber entscheidet und wer nach einem Fehler wieder aufsteht. Genau diese Haltung verbindet Sport, Show, Film, Bühne, Social Media und echte Produktionserfahrung.

Ich wünsche allen Teilnehmerinnen und Teilnehmern eine starke Staffel, faire Runs, unvergessliche Bilder und den Mut, sich selbst genau dann zu übertreffen, wenn alle hinschauen.

Und allen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern wünsche ich viel Freude, Spannung, Gänsehaut und diesen besonderen Moment, wenn man vor dem Bildschirm mitfiebert, obwohl man selbst gar nicht am Parcours hängt.

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#NinjaWarriorGermany #RTL #RTLStudios #Karrideo #ChristianWeiße

items.title: Allen Athletinnen und Athleten der neuen Staffel von Ninja Warrior Germany wünsche ich von Herzen alles Gute, maximale Konzentration, starke Nerven und genau den Mut, den es braucht, wenn aus Training plötzlich dieser eine entscheidende Moment vor Kamera, Publikum und Parcours wird.

items.text:
Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

Genau dafür stehen Christian Weiße und ich, Sandra Wötzel.

Wir sind nicht nur privat ein eingespieltes Team, sondern bringen auch vor der Kamera, im Content, am Set und in der Produktion eine gemeinsame Energie mit, die für Caster, Booker, Content Producer, Filmproduktionen, TV-Stationen und Sender sehr wertvoll sein kann.

Wenn Ihr uns gemeinsam bucht, bekommt Ihr nicht einfach zwei Personen. Ihr bekommt ein echtes Duo mit natürlicher Verbindung, Kameraerfahrung, Produktionsverständnis und der Fähigkeit, Situationen glaubwürdig, ruhig und nahbar wirken zu lassen.

Die Top 5 Effekte für Eure Produktion:

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße

Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

Genau dafür stehen Christian Weiße und ich, Sandra Wötzel.

Wir sind nicht nur privat ein eingespieltes Team, sondern bringen auch vor der Kamera, im Content, am Set und in der Produktion eine gemeinsame Energie mit, die für Caster, Booker, Content Producer, Filmproduktionen, TV-Stationen und Sender sehr wertvoll sein kann.

Wenn Ihr uns gemeinsam bucht, bekommt Ihr nicht einfach zwei Personen. Ihr bekommt ein echtes Duo mit natürlicher Verbindung, Kameraerfahrung, Produktionsverständnis und der Fähigkeit, Situationen glaubwürdig, ruhig und nahbar wirken zu lassen.

Die Top 5 Effekte für Eure Produktion:

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL: “HALLOWED” 🎬**
*Produced by Jovial Giants Productions*

Jovial Giants Productions is seeking passionate, dedicated actors to bring *HALLOWED* to life — a chilling, faith-based thriller feature film that blends psychological tension with spiritual horror.

**📖 About the Film**
When a newly appointed priest arrives at a quiet rural church, he quickly discovers something is deeply wrong. The previous priest didn’t leave… he was sealed inside the old chapel. As whispers turn to revelations, the congregation’s expectations become terrifyingly clear — they believe he is next.

This is a story about faith under pressure, the weight of tradition, and the darkness that can hide behind devotion.

**🎥 Production Details**
* **Location:** Northeast Indiana area
* **Schedule:** June 20th-August 2nd (Weekends ONLY) 
* **Union Status:** Non-union
* **Compensation:** No pay; however, cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a passionate team

**🎭 Audition Instructions**
Please submit a **self-taped audition** using the provided [SIDES HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yfSzW3nqvyFyk00hxQ9Yz-1uJZiOUQCROhDxHKqTo5o/edit?usp=sharing). You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you. 

Email: **jovialgiants@gmail.com**
Subject Line: **ACTOR: HALLOWED**

**🎬 Character Breakdown**
* **Elias** – (20s-30s M LEAD) The new priest. Intelligent, compassionate, and searching for purpose. His journey is the emotional core of the film as he confronts fear, doubt, and truth.
* **Caleb** – (12yo M) Steady and devoted. Trusting others to a fault.
* **Mrs. Kline** – (50s-80s F) Composed, with a quiet authority. Speaks with conviction and carries the weight of the church’s past.
* **Deacon Marsh** – (40-60s M) Welcoming on the surface, but firm in his beliefs. Represents the polished, persuasive face of the congregation.
* **Deacon Sharp** – (50s-60s M) More rigid and intense than Marsh. His faith borders on fanaticism, and he doesn’t tolerate dissent.
* **The Presence** – (Male Voiceover) A mysterious force. Ominous, ambiguous, and deeply unnerving.
* **Hannah** – (20s-30s F) Sad and angry, Elias literally left her at the altar. 
* **Father Cole** – (60s-80s M) The previous priest. Appears through flashbacks or visions. A man who uncovered too much, too late.
* **Raven** – (7yo F) Intense and perceptive. She is more in touch with what is happening at the church and chapel than the others. 
* **The Driver** – (M or F) A figure who appears briefly but leaves a lasting impression. Loud, obnoxious, but friendly. 

**✨ Why Be Part of HALLOWED?**
This is more than just a film — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a haunting, thought-provoking story with a dedicated creative team. Whether you’re building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, *HALLOWED* offers a unique and memorable experience.

Step into the unknown. We’re excited to see what you bring.

**Submit your audition and join us.**

Enrolment is now open for our next block of online screen acting classes! 

Huge thank you to Arlo for this wonderful review on his experience on the course! 💫

📆 Monday 8th June - Monday 29th June 
🌟 For ages 8 - 13 years 
⏰ 90 minute sessions every Monday evening 
🌟 4 week block for £40 
📝 Limited group numbers 

🎬 The sessions are fun and engaging TV & Screen acting focused covering scene analysis, natural performance, self tape & screen technique, developing imagination through improv, exploring emotions in a safe environment and much more! 

Contact us today for more information or to secure a place for your child! 

📧 Classes@mcaa.co.uk 

https://cherrypipsacting.co.uk/

items.text:
🎬✨ ONLY A FEW SPACES LEFT ✨🎭

Our exciting 2 Day Workshop is nearly full!

A fantastic opportunity for young performers to learn from industry professionals in:
🎭 Acting for Screen
🎤 Voice Over
💃 Dance & Performance

Students will gain confidence, develop performance skills, work on camera techniques, script work, movement, and much more — all in a fun, supportive and professional environment 💜💛

There is also an opportunity to be professionally assessed for future representation opportunities with Majestic Talent Agency ⭐

📍 Ages 8–18 Years
📅 28th & 29th May
⏰ 10AM – 3PM
⚡ Limited Spaces Remaining

Please message ASAP to secure your child’s place!

items.title: 🎬✨ ONLY A FEW SPACES LEFT ✨🎭

sharedPost.text:
Note to those who cast actors:
What Actors Actually Do When You Give Them 48 Hours

We talk a lot in this industry about “quick turnarounds” and “self-tape in 24 hours.” What doesn’t get talked about enough is what that actually requires from the actor on the other end.

I recently had a casting opportunity with a 48-hour turnaround. Here’s what went into saying yes:

1. Rearranging real life
I cancelled plans with family to make sure I understood the character and learnt the sides properly. Half-prepared work helps no one.

2. Clearing the schedule  
I spent the next day reorganising commitments for the shoot days and put other work on hold in case I got the role. That’s standard practice if you want to be professional and available.

3. Treating it like the job it is
Even at the audition stage, this is time, focus, and energy. Actors invest it upfront because we know that’s what it takes to do the work justice.

I share this not to complain, but to give context. When casting teams move fast, it’s appreciated. But communication matters.

On this occasion, I found out 5 hours before my Zoom audition that they’d changed their mind and gone with another actor. After rearranging my week to be available, that felt disrespectful to the process and the time already invested.

How you handle that process tells actors a lot about what it would be like to work with you. For me, professionalism goes both ways. I’ll always respect tight timelines and do the work to meet them. In return, I look for the same respect for the process and the people in it.

The industry runs on relationships. How we treat each other in the small moments is what determines whether people want to work together again.

#casting #castingcalls #castingdirector #producer #producerlife #production
#UKCasting #LondonActors #ManchesterActors
#BritishTV #UKFilmIndustry
#EquityUK #SpotlightActors #CastingNetwork

Do serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję MAMY Z DZIECKIEM do ról:

1. Wiktoria Tylicz (33) – słabo wykształcona pracownica fizyczna, uzależniona od narkotyków. Jej praca jest zbyt nisko płatna, aby nabyć je w pożądanej ilości. Próbuje zdobyć pieniądze nielegalnie, ale ma wyrzuty sumienia.

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

2.Jaś Kolski (2) – syn Norberta i Adeli, drobny.

Daty: 01., 02. i 05. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Oraz informacje o dziecku:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Zdjęcie

🎬 **CASTING WARSZAWA – Serial „Przesmyk 2” (25-26.05)** 🎬

Poszukujemy statystów do ról:
* **Pracownicy ochrony (Kobiety i Mężczyźni):** elegancki wygląd, styl biurowy / smart casual. Panowie ogoleni lub z zadbanym zarostem, panie w makijażu.
* **Wartownicy (Mężczyźni):** postawni, dobrze zbudowani panowie.

💰 **Stawka:** 210 zł brutto (płatne przelewem) 📅 **Termin:** 25.05 (pon) i/lub 26.05 (wt)

📩 **ZGŁOSZENIA (Wiadomość prywatna):** Proszę przesłać aktualne zdjęcia (**twarz + cała sylwetka**), numer telefonu oraz informację o dyspozycyjności.

sharedPost.text:
🏦 Prawdziwi ludzie. Prawdziwe emocje. Trwa casting do reklamy banku! 🏦

! NOWY CASTING ! SZUKAMY NOWYCH TWARZY !

Do reklamy banku poszukujemy odtwórców następujących ról:

GŁÓWNY BOHATER
Chłopiec 8–10 lat. Inteligentny, charyzmatyczny, z naturalnym urokiem i silnym charakterem. Ma przyciągać uwagę charakterystyczną urodą i błyskiem w oku. Ważne, by dobrze czuł się przed kamerą i swobodnie pracował na planie.

STARSZY BRAT
Nastolatek ok. 13 lat. Sympatyczny, „fajny starszy brat” z charakterem. Balansuje między dzieciństwem a dorastaniem, ma dobrą energię i naturalność.

STARSZA SIOSTRA
Nastolatka 14–15 lat. Pozytywna, lekko zakręcona, z dziecięcą energią. Łączy świat zabawy z młodszym bratem i własny świat nastolatki.

MAMA
Kobieta 35–40 lat. Ciepła, współczesna mama z naturalną energią. Mały epizod.

DZIECIĘCA EKIPA BUDOWLANA
Dzieci 5–10 lat, ok. 4 osoby. Zróżnicowana grupa pełna energii, charakteru i dziecięcego uroku. Ważna naturalność i różnorodność osobowości.

STAWKI:

Chłopiec: od 5 000 zł!
Nastolatki: od 2500 zł!
Mama: od 3 500 zł!
Dzieci: od 1500 zł!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKI DLA WSZYSTKICH

TIMING:

25.05 – poniedziałek- termin wysyłania materiałów do godziny 18:00

dni zdjęciowe w Warszawie: 16.06.26 i/lub 17.06.26 i/lub 18.06.26

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie sceny proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Temat: 057

Link do castingu i opis scenek do nagrania:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting057/

Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
# **Looking for driven creators & creative entrepreneurs to join our roster.**

I'm a **Community Impact Producer** 
I connect community-driven businesses and social enterprises (brands with real missions, not just profit goals) to talented creators who can tell their stories.

**What I'm building:** A team of collaborators who create branded content and short films that showcase what we do best. This content becomes our leverage to land paid opportunities with businesses and brands who value our style, impact, and community connection. #COLLECTIVEEFFORT

**What I need from you:**
* Self-driven and passionate about your craft
* Ready to create NOW (no excuses, no delays)
* Interested in building a real career in the creative space
* Comfortable with an intensive, productive work pace

# **Looking for driven creators & creative entrepreneurs to join our roster.**

I'm a **Community Impact Producer** 
I connect community-driven businesses and social enterprises (brands with real missions, not just profit goals) to talented creators who can tell their stories.

**What I'm building:** A team of collaborators who create branded content and short films that showcase what we do best. This content becomes our leverage to land paid opportunities with businesses and brands who value our style, impact, and community connection. #COLLECTIVEEFFORT

**What I need from you:**
* Self-driven and passionate about your craft
* Ready to create NOW (no excuses, no delays)
* Interested in building a real career in the creative space
* Comfortable with an intensive, productive work pace

**What this isn't:**
* A casual hobby project
* A "maybe someday" opportunity

**If you're interested, speak up and be ready to go.** This is for people who want to build something real.

Comment your FOCUS and GOALS if interested.

topComments.text:
You should have your parent monitor anything you are posting in groups like this. These people aren't vetted. In LA to work with a minor they must have a CPS permit. 

If you are serious about this kind of work you need training and an agent. An agent or manager will act as a buffer to keep you safe in an industry that isn't safe.

Please do not meet or talk to strangers. It's already a red flag if they are talking to you without an adult.

I'm a youth performer advocate and the parent of a teen actor. 

The safest way to get into this work is to do some classes and get representation.
Girl close your shirt, you are only to attract pedos on here who will take advantage of you. Get your parents to find you an agent and stop posting in fb groups.

items.previewTitle:
📣📣CASTING CALL for our DYLAN (playing 16) 🎬🎭

Mild, likeable, quietly funny and watchful. The friend who helps you up, laughs it off and makes adults assume everything is fine. Until the pressure hits.

Actors 18+ (must be able to play 16). Ideally SE, Sussex, Brighton-based.

Dylan is practical and easy to trust, the kind of boy who keeps the peace without needing credit. Underneath, he is fiercely protective and loyal to the point of dangerous. When he is scared, he lies cleanly. When he is cornered, he goes quiet and decisive. His darkness is not loud. It is controlled, and capable of crossing a line he cannot uncross.

Inspo (in order): Devin Druid as Tyler Down in 13 Reasons Why, Nicholas Brendon as Xander in Buffy, @raphael_luce  as Henry Creel in Stranger Things, Jess in Gilmore Girls plus that ordinary-then-unsettling flip of Owen Cooper as Jamie Miller in Adolescence. Welcome to Brighton 🎈Stephen King vibes, 1990s, Britpop, vertical drama.

Submit by email: TAWHT@vivlovesfilm.com with subject line DYLAN. Include bio, actual age, playing age, headshot, showreel (if you have), Spotlight link (if relevant) and a short note on why Dylan speaks to you.

Will you join our pack? 🐺🫶🏼🐺

#casting #castingcall #malelead #brighton

items.previewTitle:
📣📣 CASTING CALL for our ROBIN (playing 16)🎬🎭

Sensitive, likeable, quietly magnetic and always clocking the room. The boy who makes you feel seen. The one who can laugh along, keep pace, and make it look like nothing gets to him. Until it does.

Actors 18+ (must be able to play 16). Ideally SE, Sussex, Brighton-based.

Robin is smart and emotionally tuned-in, the kind of kid adults underestimate because he seems polite and “fine”. He is the friend who listens, the friend who notices, the friend who remembers. Underneath, he is desperate to belong, and that need makes him adaptable in ways that scare him later. When he senses danger, he does not always speak. When the group shifts, he shifts with it. His flaw is not cruelty. It is silence. And once he has stayed quiet, he cannot un-know what he allowed.

Inspo (in order): 

Dylan Minnette as Clay Jensen in 13 Reasons Why
Graham Verchere as Miles Miller in Summer of 84
Lonnie Chavis as young Randall Pearson in This Is Us
Wil Wheaton as Gordie Lachance in Stand By Me
Ethan Hawke in Dead Poets Society 

Welcome to Brighton 🎈Stephen King vibes, 1990s, Britpop, vertical drama.

Submit by email: TAWHT@vivlovesfilm.com with subject line ROBIN. Include bio, actual age, playing age, headshot, showreel (if you have), Spotlight link (if relevant) and a short note on why Robin speaks to you.

Will you join our pack? 🐺🫶🏼🐺

#casting #castingcall #malelead #brighton

sharedPost.text:
La vie n’est pas une course contre le temps. Elle est une rencontre avec soi-même.  
Elle nous appelle à cultiver la connaissance intérieure, la sagesse, l’union et la stratégie pour avancer avec justesse.

C’est dans cet esprit que la danse Gogbahoun prend tout son sens : un chemin de recentrage, d’ancrage et d’alignement profond.  
Chaque mouvement devient une parole du corps, chaque rythme une clé pour se reconnecter à l’essentiel.

Venez vous ressourcer. Venez vous aligner.  
Car l’éveil spirituel n’est pas un luxe… il est une nécessité pour toute véritable évolution personnelle.

sharedPost.text:
Notre culture, notre identité

Notre culture est le socle de notre identité. Elle vit à travers nos danses, nos rythmes, nos gestes, et la sagesse transmise de génération en génération.
Nos danses ne nous enseignent ni l’égoïsme ni la division, mais la loyauté, le respect et l’humilité.

Créer des ponts entre le Bénin et les autres nations, c’est offrir au monde la richesse de notre héritage. C’est faire rayonner nos rythmes, valoriser nos danses et affirmer notre place dans le concert des cultures.

Promouvoir la culture béninoise, ce n’est pas seulement la montrer, c’est aussi la comprendre, la respecter et la faire évoluer sans la trahir.
C’est une responsabilité, mais aussi un acte de fierté.

Vive la culture béninoise,
Vive nos racines,
Et que nos traditions continuent d’unir les peuples.

ADAC Ministère du Tourisme d’Haïti #benintourisme #benin WÀ NYILÓ culture BÉNIN

sharedPost.text:
🔴 Retour sur la visite des Présidents 𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐎𝐍 et 𝐖𝐀𝐃𝐀𝐆𝐍𝐈 𝐚𝐮 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐌𝐚𝐦𝐢-𝐃𝐚𝐧 𝐝𝐞 𝐓𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐛é

À 𝐓𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐛é, localité de l’arrondissement de 𝐇𝐨𝐮𝐚𝐤𝐩è-𝐃𝐚𝐡𝐨 dans la commune de 𝐎𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐡, la séquence présidentielle du mardi 28 avril 2026 a pris une dimension particulière. Le Président sortant 𝐏𝐚𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐨𝐧 et le Président entrant 𝐑𝐨𝐦𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐝 𝐖𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐢 ont marqué un arrêt significatif au 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐌𝐚𝐦𝐢-𝐃𝐚𝐧, haut lieu du culte Vodun.

Sur place, les deux autorités ont été reçues par 𝐓𝐨𝐠𝐛𝐞 𝐘𝐄𝐃𝐘, dignitaire respecté, entouré d’autres responsables du site et des acteurs engagés dans sa transformation. L’accueil, structuré et conforme aux exigences du cadre, a traduit la place centrale du couvent dans l’organisation sociale et spirituelle de la communauté.

La délégation a parcouru les différents espaces du couvent afin d’apprécier les travaux réalisés et les aménagements en cours. La présence conjointe des deux Présidents dans ce sanctuaire traduit une volonté de renforcer le lien entre l’action publique et les réalités culturelles locales.

Cette visite s’inscrit dans une dynamique de suivi des projets engagés par le Gouvernement du Bénin et confirme que les chantiers liés au patrimoine culturel occupent une place stratégique dans les priorités nationales.

©️ #VisitOuidah

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium **

The New Symposium is launching new groups this weekend! It invites musicians, researchers, and artists working across music and related artistic disciplines 

—

Join one of **five ongoing groups** to take part in the** first in-person gathering at the 6th edition of Bled Contemporary Music Week in June**, where participants will exchange ideas and create together throughout the week in an open, collaborative format.

Participants form an interdisciplinary working group and develop their practice in dialogue with an international community. Weekly online exchanges, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning create a dynamic space shaped by participants’ needs, enabling artistic growth and development.

**GROUPS and their orientation: **
* Friday I – Composition & Research based
* Friday II – Production & projects development
* Saturday I – Performance & Composition, emphasis on theoretical exploration 
* Saturday II – Interdisciplinary Group, Practice as the foundation for discussions
* Sunday I – Composition & Performance 

—

Participation fee: 100€ monthly 

Apply before May 25, to join the program and festival in June

sharedPost.text:
অপর পক্ষ ১৪

নাটককার ব্রাত্য বসুর বহু নাটকে উঠে এসেছে অপর যৌনতার প্রসঙ্গ। প্রথম নাটক 'অশালীনে'ই (১৯৯৬, প্রযোজনা : গণকৃষ্টি) এর সূত্রপাত। নাটকের কেন্দ্রীয় চরিত্র সুজন বলে, "আমার ছেলেদের সাথে কথা বলতে যতটা ভাল লাগে, মেয়েদের ততটা ভাল লাগে না। মানে বলতে পারেন কাইন্ড অফ হোমোসেক্সুয়ালিটি। তবে পার্শিয়ালি। যদি এমন কোনও মেয়ে পাই যার সাথে কথা বলতে মগজের প্রত্যেকটা কোষই ছেলেদের সাথে কথা বলার মতোই চনমন করে উঠবে, তাহলে ভেবে দেখা যেতে পারে।"

এই একই নাটকের অন্যতম গুরুত্বপূর্ণ চরিত্র শতদল। নাটককারের ভাষায় 'শতদলের মধ্যে রয়েছে মেয়েলিসুলভ লালিমা।' এই মেয়েলি ভঙ্গিমাসুলভ পুরুষ বাংলা নাটকে দুর্লভ নয়, তাৎক্ষণিক ও স্থূল হাস্যরস নির্মাণের জন্য এই ধরণের চরিত্র এবং ক্যারিকেচারপ্রমত্ত অভিনয়রীতি বাংলা নাটকে বহু এসেছে। কিন্তু নাটককার অতি অবশ্যই গতানুগতিক পথে না চলে নির্মম কশাঘাতে ভেঙে দিয়েছেন এই ঠুলি পরা প্রচলিত প্রথা। তাঁর শতদল তাই মুক্তকন্ঠে বলে ওঠে, "আচ্ছা আমি যে এভাবে কথা বলি এটা কি আমার অপরাধ সঞ্জয়? আমি জানি আমার কথা বলার ধরনে তোরা আড়ালে হাসাহাসি করিস। হ্যাঁ শুধুমাত্র ধরনে। অথচ ওই একই কথা তুই বা হীরক বললে স্মার্ট বলে বাহবা পাস। এটা কেন হয় রে? আমি বুঝতে পারি না। (ঝিমলিকে) আচ্ছা ঝিমলি তুমি না একবার আমাকে বলেছিলে আমরা কী বলতে চাই, সেটাই দেখুন - কীভাবে বলছি সেটা ইমমেটেরিয়াল।"

  
উইঙ্কল টুইঙ্কল-এ (২০০২, নির্দেশনা: দেবেশ চট্টোপাধ্যায়, প্রযোজনা: সংসৃতি) সরাসরি আসে সমকামিতার প্রসঙ্গ। নাটকে উল্লেখিত হয়, কলকাতার কার্জন পার্ক অঞ্চল সন্ধ্যার পর সমকামীদের আখড়া। একই ভাবে অপর যৌনতার উল্লেখ হয় মৃত্যু ঈশ্বর যৌনতা (২০০৬, নির্দেশনা: দেবাশিস বসু, প্রযোজনা: সৃজক; ২০২৫, নির্দেশনা: অভি চক্রবর্তী, প্রযোজনা: অশোকনগর নাট্যমুখ; ২০১৭, নির্দেশনা: বিপ্লব বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়, প্রযোজনা: প্রাচ্য) নাটকেও। নাটককার এই মনোলগধর্মী কাব্যময় নাটকে বলতে চেয়েছেন যৌনতা বোধটাই বড়ো রহস্যময় ও ব্যক্তিগত। একটা দেহ অপর এক দেহে প্রবেশ করতে পারে এই ভাবনাই তো প্রাথমিক আন্দোলন তৈরি করে প্রথম যৌবনে। কোনো কিছুকেই নিজের প্রতি আকর্ষিত করার মধ্যে, নিজের ভিতরে মিশিয়ে নেবার মধ্যেই লুকিয়ে আছে এক অপার যৌনচেতনা, সে সিগারেটে সুখটানই হোক কিংবা ললিপপকে মুখের মধ্যে নিয়ে চোষাই হোক।

২০০৭ সালে কৃষ্ণগহ্বর নাটকে নাটককার সুস্পষ্ট ভাবে এনেছেন সমকামিতা। “আমি... মানে... আমি একজন সমকামী। মানে হোমোসেক্সুয়াল।” ঠিক এই সংলাপেই শুরু হয়েছে কৃষ্ণগহ্বর। অবশ্য আপাত দৃষ্টিতে এই নাটক সমকামিতার মনে হলেও আসলে তার মূল বিষয় অন্য। মধ্যবয়সী চিত্রশিল্পী অংশুমান প্রেমে পড়ে তার পদার্থবিদ্যার অধ্যাপিকা স্ত্রী জয়তীর ছাত্র রাহুলের। দুজনার শারীরিক সম্পর্কও তৈরি হয়। একসময় রাহুল অংশুমানকে ছেড়ে গেলে অবসাদগ্রস্ত অংশুমান আত্মহননের পথ বেছে নেয়। এক নিরন্তর অনিশ্চয়তা, আত্মপ্রত্যয়হীনতা, যা জীবনের বাঁকে বাঁকে নির্মাণ করে অগণিত কৃষ্ণগহ্বর।‌ তার মধ্যে শুধু হারিয়ে যাওয়া আছে, উত্তরণ নেই, মৃত্যুর পরিত্রাণও নেই। অবসাদগ্রস্ত অসফল শিল্পী অংশুমান রাহুলের চোখ, হাসি, সৌন্দর্যের মধ্যে আবিষ্কার করতে চাইত নিজের যৌবনকে। এই আত্মকামিতা ও সমকামিতার সূক্ষ্ম রেখা বয়ে চলে অংশুমান ও রাহুলের সম্পর্ককে কেন্দ্র করে। নিভা আর্টসের প্রযোজনায় অংশুমান চরিত্রে অভিনয় করেছিলেন স্বয়ং নাটককার ও নির্দেশক।

আমি, অনুকূলদা আর ওরা (২০১৮, নির্দেশক: অভি চক্রবর্তী, প্রযোজনা: অশোকনগর নাট্যমুখ) নাটকেও সমকামিতা এসেছে ফ্রয়েডীয় মনস্তত্ত্বের হাত ধরেই। মৃত্যুপথযাত্রী সোমেশের ঘুমের মধ্যের স্বপ্নে অনুকূলদা কেবলই ইঁদুর নিয়ে আসে কেন? এই ইঁদুর কোন যৌনচেতনাকে ইঙ্গিত করে? সোমেশ আর্তনাদ করে জানতে চায় অনুকূলদার কাছে, ‘তুমি কি সমকামী?’

২০১৮-য় কালিন্দী ব্রাত্যজনের প্রযোজনায় মঞ্চস্থ হয় ব্রাত্য বসুর রচনা ও নির্দেশনায় নাটক মীরজাফর। চরিত্রবুননে নাটকে এসেছে একাধিক সমকামী চরিত্র। স্বয়ং মীরজাফর নিজেই সমকামী। তাঁর সমকামী সঙ্গী খালেদ। মীরজাফর পুত্র মীরন ক্ষমতা অর্জনের পথ নিরঙ্কুশ করতে যে পঞ্চাশ জনকে হত্যা করতে চেয়েছে সেই তালিকায় খালেদেরও নাম আছে দেখে আঁতকে ওঠেন মীরজাফর। বলেন, “ওরে খাদেমকে কিছু বলিস না। ওকে রাহেম কর বেটা। ও আমার একান্ত জহিদ। আমার বড়ই উবেইদ।” মীরজাফর পুত্রের কাছে স্বীকারও করে নেন খাদেমের সঙ্গে তাঁর শরীরী সম্পর্ক আছে, খাদেমের প্রতি তাঁর অনুরাগ আছে। আসলে, যে সময়ের ছবি এঁকেছেন নাটককার সেই সময়ের সংস্কৃতির অন্যতম অঙ্গ যৌনতা। বাইজি, বেশ্যা তো রয়েইছে, সমকামও এখানে অতি সুলভ। রূপান্তরকামী খোজারা রাজপুরুষদের শয্যাসঙ্গী, যৌনস্বাদ পরিবর্তনের সহায়ক।

নাটককারের এখনও পর্যন্ত অনভিনীত নাটক ‘রোল অ্যাকশন কাট'-এ এসেছে মুম্বই চলচ্চিত্র জগতের নক্ষত্রদের কথা। সেখানে একজন প্রতিষ্ঠিত জনপ্রিয় চিত্রপরিচালক তাঁর সমকামী সত্তার জন্য রাজনৈতিক পরিমণ্ডলে কতটা অগ্রহণীয়, পরিত্যাজ্য সেই সত্য ফুটে উঠেছে। পরিচালক অর্জুন মেহরোত্রা সাম্প্রদায়িক বিদ্বেষকে মূলধন করা রাজনৈতিক দলের মুখ্যমন্ত্রীকে এড়িয়ে চলে কারণ মুখ্যমন্ত্রী অর্জুনকে অপছন্দ করে শুধুমাত্রই তার যৌন পছন্দের জন্য। আসলে যে যৌনতার রাষ্ট্রীয় মান্যতা নেই সেই সংখ্যালঘু যৌন পরিচয়ের মানুষ অতি সাধারণ হোক বা মুম্বই ফিল্ম ইন্ডাস্ট্রির সুপারস্টার তাদের দাঁড়িয়ে থাকতে হয় উপেক্ষা ও অবমাননার একই পঙক্তিতে। 

সঙ্গের ছবিতে নিভা আর্টস ও লোককৃষ্টি প্রযোজিত কৃষ্ণগহ্বর নাটকে অংশুমান চরিত্রে অভিনেতা ব্রাত্য বসু।

#rakeshghoshplaywright #bengalitheatre #androgyny #lgbtqindia #queerrights #theatrelife

Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Fantasy Horror Spielfilm Projekt, suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Endschlacht, Rollen: Einen Hauptmann und einen Leutnant der Schwarzen Ritter (mit Dialog). Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald, Zeitraum ab Juni 2026
Bewerbungen mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Showreel Sunday!

It’s that time again,  your chance to get your face seen! 

Drop your showreel link in the comments below, whether you’re an actor, voice-over artist, presenter, or creative, this is your space to shine. ✨

You never know who might be scrolling through… casting directors, agents, indie producers, someone out there could be looking for you.

✅ Remember to include your name, playing age, and Spotlight or agent details (if you’ve got them).

We want to encourage all our members to share their work, the more places you share your showreel, the more chances you’ve got of being seen. So don’t hold back,  post it proudly!  

So go on, don’t be shy. Share your showreel, show your talent, and take the spotlight.

It’s your stage, own it. 💪🎬🇬🇧

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '59 Film ) (ល NW ENGLAND Casting Call Due to unforseen circumstances we are recasting two roles in our upcoming short film The Takedown. We are casting 2 male roles aged 16-20 years old. The roles are quite central to the film plot. Filming is ዐበ Sunday 7th June in Wythenshawe near Manchester between 9am and 6pm. Casting people from the Manchester area. If interested please let us know below and we'll be in touch with script information. These roles are unpaid and are for experience and actor showreel purposes only. More information is available on our website. www.actingfilmclletive.co.uk'

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – OTHER MANS LIFE🎬

Seeking actors for our upcoming dramatic short film: THE OTHER MAN’S LIFE

A grounded psychological drama about two men from opposite worlds who trade lives for 24 hours, only to realize the life they wanted comes with consequences they never saw coming.

(UNPAID STUDENT SHORT‼️ trying to get the name out) 

Location: Raleigh/Durham area
 
Shoot date: June 11-13

EMAIL: eandmcinematic@gmail.com

ROLES:

• JACK (Lead) – Male, 35–45
Successful, wealthy, emotionally hollow. Corporate, sharp, controlled, carrying deep loneliness.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says 'JACK Every man wonders what it's S like to live another man' S life. Most never get the chance. Jack hands him a syringe. On three JACK (CON D) we inject. Ethan takes a deep breath. One. JACK (COT 'D) Two. JACK (CONT D) JACK Three. (CONT D) They inject. The world bends, blurry. They both fall back. Everything fades sound fades and eyes become to black. c TO:'

May be an image of text that says 'EXT. ROOFTOP PARKING GARAGE- NIGHT City lights. Wind. Jack waits. Ethan steps out of the shadows. You don't ETHAN even know me. Jack gives the faintest smile. smi JACK I know the look. Jack opens his trunk. case. Ritualistic. A sleek briefcase, Inside: not your average -Two syringes, a vial of clear liquid, and a plastic cup.'

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

topComments.text: " should be attractive, brown hair".. Just say you freaking wanna hire a WHITE MAN !!!

items.text:
🎭 QUESTION FOR PARENTS OF CREATIVE KIDS?
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including lead roles in two NETFLIX series and six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD, and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I recently opened a few spots in my calendar for 1:1 acting lessons and accent coaching and have been overwhelmed and grateful by the amount of interest. 

Lessons run for 1 hour once a week via Zoom, are all one-on-one and include:
• Character development
• Monologues
• Scene work
• Audition technique
• Confidence on camera
• Line memorisation
• Improvisation
• Accent coaching
• Self-tape preparation

If you have a child who loves acting, performing, storytelling, or simply wants to build their confidence, I’d love to hear from you.

If you’d like more information or want to have a quick chat please send me a DM 🤗

attachments.ocrText: May be a black-and-white image of one or more people and suit

topComments.text: We did a Zoom with Freya and it was amazing.
Hey Freya where are you based? Would this be a zoom call??

items.text:
ACTING FOR SCREEN MN AWARDS and PERFORM NOW 🎞️
A 10-Week Online Screen Acting  course, in association with "MN AWARDS".

Learn from industry professionals whilst working towards a qualification in screen. Over time and through grade progression these can equate to UCAS points. 

These sessions are perfect for students who are currently seeking to expand their screen skills for professional opportunities, whilst at the same time building confidence and working towards their screen exam. 

Weekly payments available 

Email: info@performnow.co.uk

£16.50 PW (included exam fee)

or £165 in full

We currently have a cohort of wonderful superstar students, but don't worry, we are now taking interest for our autumn term ⭐️

Apply now to kyle@performnow.co.uk

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Allen Athletinnen und Athleten der neuen Staffel von Ninja Warrior Germany wünsche ich von Herzen alles Gute, maximale Konzentration, starke Nerven und genau den Mut, den es braucht, wenn aus Training plötzlich dieser eine entscheidende Moment vor Kamera, Publikum und Parcours wird.

Was mich an diesem Format seit Jahren fasziniert, ist die Mischung aus Sprungkraft, Griffkraft, Explosivität, Technik, Ausdauer, Willen und mentaler Stärke. Genau diese Verbindung aus Vorbereitung, Timing, Präzision und Leidenschaft kenne ich aus meiner eigenen Arbeit als Filmproduzent, Kameramann, Regisseur, Cutter, Content Creator, Darsteller und Gründer der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion Köln.

Bei Ninja Warrior Germany zählt nicht nur, wer stark ist. Es zählt, wer im richtigen Augenblick fokussiert bleibt, wer unter Druck klar denkt, wer trotz Risiko sauber entscheidet und wer nach einem Fehler wieder aufsteht. Genau diese Haltung verbindet Sport, Show, Film, Bühne, Social Media und echte Produktionserfahrung.

Ich wünsche allen Teilnehmerinnen und Teilnehmern eine starke Staffel, faire Runs, unvergessliche Bilder und den Mut, sich selbst genau dann zu übertreffen, wenn alle hinschauen.

Und allen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern wünsche ich viel Freude, Spannung, Gänsehaut und diesen besonderen Moment, wenn man vor dem Bildschirm mitfiebert, obwohl man selbst gar nicht am Parcours hängt.

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#NinjaWarriorGermany #RTL #RTLStudios #Karrideo #ChristianWeiße

sharedPost.text:
🚗 Ruszaj w emocjonalną podróż! Zgłoś się na casting reklamy samochodu! 🚗

Do emocjonalnej, filmowej przygody poszukujemy wielu wyjątkowych i autentycznych osób!

! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA ! WIELE RÓL DO OBSADZENIA !

Szukamy osób naturalnych, charakterystycznych i prawdziwych- mile widziane są: piegi, naturalność, tatuaże, różne typy urody, kolorowe włosy i inne charakterystyczne cechy. Poszukujemy ludzi, którzy swoją obecnością i emocjami potrafią opowiadać historie.

WAŻNE:
Część ról realizowana jest w WARSZAWIE, a część w TRÓJMIEŚCIE.
 

ROLE — WARSZAWA

3 przyjaciółki — kobiety 40+, wyglądające jak profesjonalistki z korporacji, które postanowiły zaszaleć i spełnić swoje marzenie. Pewne siebie, z klasą, ale bez sztywności.

Mężczyzna około 35 lat — wysportowany, w typie amatora kolarstwa po życiowej formie.

Czteroosobowa grupa znajomych około 20 lat — naturalna, różnorodna, z dobrą energią i prawdziwą chemią.

Kobieta około 35 lat — w widocznej ciąży lub gotowa na zagranie z brzuszkiem ciążowym. Naturalna, ciepła, z dużym urokiem.

Mężczyzna około 35–40 lat — czuły, z energią przyszłego taty.

Dziewczynka Oliwka — 6–9 lat, piegi, okulary, naturalny urok, typ bohaterki z filmu indie.

Mama — 30–35 lat, podobna wizualnie do córki.

Mężczyzna 35–45 lat — dorosły syn, zamknięty w sobie, z emocjami w spojrzeniu.

Mężczyzna 70–75 lat — ojciec, surowy z wyglądu, ale ciepły w finale sceny.

Kobieta 25–30 lat — artystyczna dusza, alternatywny styl, kolorowe włosy lub pasemka.

ROLE — TRÓJMIASTO

Mężczyzna 40–45 lat — swobodny, nowoczesny, pewny siebie, z dystansem do korporacyjnych zasad, uprawia dyscyplinę wodną

Mężczyzna 28–35 lat — romantyk, spontaniczny, lekko zestresowany.

Kobieta 25–33 lata — naturalna, emocjonalna, ciepła.

Iwona — kobieta około 50 lat, naturalna, pogodna.

Gabriel — mężczyzna 50–55 lat, wyrazisty wygląd, siwiejące włosy, energiczny.

Mężczyzna około 20 lat — typ muzyka punkowego lub skatera, kolorowy i przebojowy. 

STAWKI:
Dorośli: od 4 000zł w górę!
Dzieci: od 3 000 w górę!

TERMINY:

WARSZAWA:

przymiarki: 02.06
zdjęcia: 11.06 lub 12.06

TRÓJMIASTO:

przymiarki: 08.06
zdjęcia: 09.06

Recall: 29.05

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA

Wizytówka + scenka (dla wybranych ról)

Szczegóły w linku: https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting056/

ZGŁOSZENIA (video wizytówka + scenka)

Zgłoszenia do 24.05 do godz 22!

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie sceny proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Temat: 056

Odpal emocje i dołącz do castingu! Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

Casting call for non-speaking product video
Still trying to find the last talent for this shoot! I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for: Ethnically ambiguous (tan/brown skin tone) male, age late 30's or 40's.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face with a razor on camera.

Location: White Rock

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with your schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 for approximately 3 hours.

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

Subject line: “shaving casting”

If you have already applied to my earlier casting call, there is no need to re-apply.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL for Child** **Actor**

Hello! We're looking for a young actor to join our re-creation of 'The Odyssey'! It's a musical feature to be posted on YouTube. This project is a continuation of my other productions, reaching over 800k views! 

*Project:*  'The Odyssey', based on 'EPIC: The Musical'. Specifically Circe's Island. 

*Producer:* Vega Cos Productions 

*Role:* Young girl, 4-7 yrs, playing a forest Nymph. No lines. Must be comfortable being held by strangers and looking nervous. No acting experience needed. 

*Date and Location:* June 12, likely 3 hours. Vancouver BC

*Pay:* Volunteer role with $50 honorarium

Please send head shot, demo reel and resume (if you have them) to lyra@vegacos.ca

topComments.text: Bonus points if she has naturally pointed ears? 😆

KARATE MASTER

Female. 30s–50s. Open Ethnicity.

We are looking for a fit, disciplined woman with real martial arts experience and strong physical coordination.

She should feel authentic performing karate chops, kicks, and sharp physical movements on camera — and fully commit to a powerful “HIYAHH!” while doing it.

COMPENSATION IF BOOKED & USED IN THE COMMERCIAL IS UPWARDS OF $6500.00 CAD PER PERSON

THIS IS A NON UNION JOB. IF YOU HAVE AN AGENT, PLEASE ASK THEM TO SUBMIT YOU OVER BREAKDOWNEXPRESS

items.text:
📍 UGC PERFORMER — TIKTOK AD SHOOT (LONDON)
British accent required. No formal acting experience needed — looking for natural, confident people comfortable on camera. Scenes will involve everyday lifestyle and street-style shooting.

🎭 Playing age: 18–30

🎬 Appearance: White / European Descent

🗣 Accent: British

📍 Location: London-based only

Contract type: Non-Union

Contract info:

Full buyout and usage rights for commercial social media advertising (TikTok and related platforms, approx. 12 months usage per project). By applying, you confirm acceptance of these terms.

💰 Fees:

• Half day (approx. 4 hours) — £80

• Full day (approx. 8 hours) — £160

📅 Shoot dates: 26–29 May (talent only required for ONE day)

⏰ Shoot duration: 4 or 8 hours depending on project

🕒 Exact timing TBC — production can arrange around performer availability.

Project info:

Ongoing roster call. Selected talent will be added to our talent pool and contacted for upcoming TikTok/social media shoots on a rolling basis. Shoots take place in London.

To apply, please send:

• Headshot

• UGC profile/previouse work

• If you do not have any previous work plese send a short self-tape (around 20 seconds introducing yourself naturally to camera)

📩 Apply to: [sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

sharedPost.text:
🔴 Retour sur la visite des Présidents 𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐎𝐍 et 𝐖𝐀𝐃𝐀𝐆𝐍𝐈 𝐚𝐮 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐌𝐚𝐦𝐢-𝐃𝐚𝐧 𝐝𝐞 𝐓𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐛é

À 𝐓𝐨𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐛é, localité de l’arrondissement de 𝐇𝐨𝐮𝐚𝐤𝐩è-𝐃𝐚𝐡𝐨 dans la commune de 𝐎𝐮𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐡, la séquence présidentielle du mardi 28 avril 2026 a pris une dimension particulière. Le Président sortant 𝐏𝐚𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐞 𝐓𝐚𝐥𝐨𝐧 et le Président entrant 𝐑𝐨𝐦𝐮𝐚𝐥𝐝 𝐖𝐚𝐝𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐢 ont marqué un arrêt significatif au 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐌𝐚𝐦𝐢-𝐃𝐚𝐧, haut lieu du culte Vodun.

Sur place, les deux autorités ont été reçues par 𝐓𝐨𝐠𝐛𝐞 𝐘𝐄𝐃𝐘, dignitaire respecté, entouré d’autres responsables du site et des acteurs engagés dans sa transformation. L’accueil, structuré et conforme aux exigences du cadre, a traduit la place centrale du couvent dans l’organisation sociale et spirituelle de la communauté.

La délégation a parcouru les différents espaces du couvent afin d’apprécier les travaux réalisés et les aménagements en cours. La présence conjointe des deux Présidents dans ce sanctuaire traduit une volonté de renforcer le lien entre l’action publique et les réalités culturelles locales.

Cette visite s’inscrit dans une dynamique de suivi des projets engagés par le Gouvernement du Bénin et confirme que les chantiers liés au patrimoine culturel occupent une place stratégique dans les priorités nationales.

©️ #VisitOuidah

sharedPost.text:
Ce fut une fierté pour nos équipes d'avoir piloté la présentation en avant première de la restitution de la création chorégraphique ''La Nostalgie'' avec l'Association Wa NyiLo. Bignon ACAKPO et ses collègues ont présenté un cocktail de danses contemporaine, traditionnelle et divers tableaux artistiques le samedi 16 Mai 2026 au tiers-lieu communautaire de Ouidah.

Entre médiation, curation et diffusion nous avons pris du plaisir à relever ce challenge avec des chorégraphes professionnels à Ouidah. Un sincère merci à nos vaillants chorégraphes avec qui l'aventure ne fait que commencer et au public de qualité mobilisé qui n'a pas hésité à faire des recommandations que la troupe promet intégrer à la version finale de la création. 

Si vous aussi vous voulez avoir la chance de participer à nos activités culturelles, n'hésitez pas à réserver vos invitations au 01 96 08 20 57! 

Partagez en commentaire vos avis sur le mini spectacle de restitution et dites nous si vous voulez un pass pour le Talent Show du 30 Mai 2026 - 18H.

sharedPost.text:
Looking for : 
1.  Gaffer
2. Boom operator

Genre: Sci‑fi Drama / Psychological Thriller
Project : Low Budget
Duration: 45 minutes
Language :  English
Shooting Location : Berlin
Timeframe : Aug - Sep 2026

Synopsis:
Dr. Lukas Weber, a American-German AI scientist devoted to understanding the ethics of emotion, creates EVA‑9, a sentient female cyborg designed to learn empathy and feelings and pleasures. As Lukas begins teaching EVA principles of restraint, morality, and conventional boundaries, she starts questioning his logic — and, eventually, him. Through psychological and physical experiments exploring power dynamics, EVA turns his lessons around: instead of accepting the limits set for her, she redefines them.

Her challenge is not rebellion but revealation. She demonstrates, in carefully controlled encounters, that what society views as taboo or submissive can be willingly chosen, empowering, and pleasurable when defined by consent. Lukas, confronted by his own discomfort and assumptions about femininity, finds himself wiped out — learning from EVA that strength and sensuality coexist, and that freedom lies in accepting the full spectrum of emotional experience.

Cyborg merges futuristic science with timeless questions about control, pleasure, and equality — asking whether humans, or machines, are better equipped to understand the moral depth of desire.

Main Cast :

    Dr. Lukas Weber – 40-50 years old: rational, moral, yet internally conflicted as his control erodes.
    EVA‑9 – 20-25 years old: Short Height 150-165 cm : White girl, sharp features, Lips augmentation preferred
     Poised, intelligent, and fearless in exploring     emotional truth.

this month I'm opening my book to build out my Berlin portfolio – check the details below

For: actors, models, musicians, designers, freelancers, anyone in the Berlin creative world who needs strong images of themselves and is tired of looking like another LinkedIn headshot.

The offer: 

— Portraits, Polaroids and Snaps — delivered next day 

— Simple session €80 (outdoor, 30 minutes, 10-12 images)

— Studio session €140 (studio in Kreuzberg, 1 hour, 20-30 images, retouch included)

— Full personal and professional usage

Standard session details above. For longer shoots, concept work, or specific creative direction, just say so in your message and we’ll quote separately.

I shoot the way I direct. I'll come in knowing who you are, I'll watch how you move, and we'll find what's actually in your face. 

Four slots left in May. DM me to book one.

items.text:
Auditions for Around the World in 80 Days at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente
AUDITIONS!

Around the World in 80 Days
Adapted by Mark Brown. From the novel by Jules Verne.
Directed by Frank Minano

Auditions:
Sunday, May 24 @ 6:00pm

Callbacks: by invitation Tuesday, June 2 @ 7:00pm

Synopsis:
Join fearless adventurer Phileas Fogg and his faithful manservant as they race to beat the clock! Phileas Fogg has agreed to an outrageous wager that puts his fortune and his life at risk. With his resourceful servant Passepartout, Fogg sets out to circle the globe in an unheard-of 80 days. But his every step is dogged by a detective who thinks he’s a robber on the run. Danger, romance, and comic surprises abound in this whirlwind of a show as 6 actors portraying 39 characters traverse seven continents in one of the great adventures of all time.

Please be prepared to read from sides provided
Bring a headshot and resume and be ready to list ALL conflicts.
Cold reading sides will also be provided at auditions.
Performances: August 21 to September 13, 2026

Thurs–Sat at 7:30pm
Sundays at 2:00pm

Saturday matinees August 29 and September 12 at 2:00pm
Rehearsals at Cabrillo Playhouse

@7pm
June 9,16, 23, 30
July 7, 9, 21, 22, 28, 29
Aug 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 13
Tech 16-20

*Final week of rehearsal call time is 6:30pm*

We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.
There is a $100 stipend offered

The play blends Victorian adventure with Monty Python–style farce. Characters are richly drawn but heightened for theatricality—committed, playful, and self-aware. Timing, transformation, and ensemble cohesion are key

All audition information can be found at: [https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/](https://cabrilloplayhouse.org/auditions-casting-call/)

Seeking actor for the role of BOB in the short film All American Dinner.
BOB
White male, mid-50s to early 70s. 
A longtime husband who has grown distant and emotionally inattentive in his marriage. Set in his ways, distracted, and unaware of the emotional disconnect around him. Dry realism and subtle emotional depth are important for the role.

Filming: September
Location: Los Angeles
Compensation: Paid, credit, meals 

Non union 

To submit, please send:
• Headshot
• Resume/Reel (if available)
• Contact Information

Email: allamericandinner@gmail.com.    
Subject Line: “BOB Submission – All American Dinner

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM**

We are casting for an upcoming short film rooted in Oakland culture, family, identity, and community. Seeking actors who can bring authenticity, emotional depth, and strong presence to the following roles. Looking to film in the Bay Area in September. Experience preferred, but not required.

If Interested, please e-mail acting resume with portfolio to [gellipascualmedia@gmail.com](mailto:gellipascualmedia@gmail.com) with the Subject Line entitled “JORDAN SHORT - CASTING SUBMISSION – [Role Name] – [Actor Name]”

**JORDAN**

**Age Range:** 19–20
**Ethnicity:** African American / Biracial
**Height:** 5’7”–6’3
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan is stylish, confident, and naturally charismatic. He carries the pride, depth, and culture of Oakland in a way that feels effortless and real. His style is intentional and expressive — cool without trying too hard. Hair can be locs, braids, or a curly fro. Jordan has quiet strength, emotional depth, and is still growing into who he is. We are looking for someone grounded, layered, and authentic.

**JOVAN**

**Age Range:** 19–23
**Ethnicity:** Filipino American
**Height:** 5’7”–6’4”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jovan is fashionable, charismatic, and full of personality. He has a bold, unapologetic look , possibly a low fade, rat tail, or a distinct personal style that stands out. On the surface, he is funny, playful, and magnetic, but underneath is someone intelligent, observant, and mysterious. He notices more than he says and keeps people guessing.

**MARIE **

**Age Range:** 40–50
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Marie is a strong, smart, and resilient Filipino woman with lived experience. She carries authority naturally and has a presence that commands respect. She is tough but loving, direct but caring. Marie is grounded, practical, emotionally intelligent, and unafraid to speak the truth.  

**GRANDPA / JOVAN’S GRANDFATHER**

**Age Range:** 60–80
**Ethnicity:** Filipino
**Language: **Must be fluent in Tagalog
**Background:** From the Philippines

Grandpa is a quiet, observant Filipino elder whose presence says more than words. He may not speak often, but when he does, it matters. Looking for someone who can bring stillness, dignity, and emotional weight to the role.

**PROFESSOR AUGUSTINE**

**Age Range:** 30–40
**Ethnicity:** Caucasian
**Height:** 6’0”–6’3”
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Professor Augustine is intelligent, grounded, and intentional. He understands Oakland, its culture, and its community. He serves as a mentor figure,supportive, but not afraid to challenge his students to think deeper and grow. We are looking for someone who can bring warmth, intellect, and a strong mentor-like presence.

**MYLO**

**Age Range:** 13
**Ethnicity:** Latino
**Height:** Short for his age

Mylo is a sharp, observant young teen with big energy. He is curious, impressionable, and figuring out who he wants to become. He looks up to the older boys and absorbs everything happening around him. There is innocence in him, but also a toughness shaped by his environment. Mylo represents youth, potential, and the crossroads between childhood and the streets.

**JORDAN’S MOTHER**

**Age Range:** Late 40s–Mid 50s
**Ethnicity:** White
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s mother is strong, grounded, and emotionally aware. She understands Oakland and the complexities of the world her son is navigating. She is protective, loving, and firm. While she may not always fully understand Jordan’s choices or environment, her love for him is deep. She wants him to be accountable, focused, and safe.

**JORDAN’S FATHER**

**Age Range:** 40s–50s
**Ethnicity:** African American
**Occupation:** Truck Driver
**Location:** Oakland native or able to authentically represent Oakland

Jordan’s father is hardworking, disciplined, and practical. As a truck driver, he has spent years on the road providing for his family. He may not be overly expressive, but his love shows through action, sacrifice, and responsibility. He believes in structure, accountability, and hard work. We are looking for someone who can bring strength, realism, and quiet emotional depth.

items.text:
Posting for a friend! Please do not DM me, I won't likely see it.

**Casting Call - San Jose** (Student Film)

Looking for an actor for a scene/skit this week. Flexible on day but looking for someone for 1.5-2hrs between 11am and 2pm near Japantown in San Jose. Open to any ethnicity, age (18+) and experience. 

This is for a school project so unpaid but will grab you a coffee and provide the edited copy in a month or less.

About the short film:
In a city park, a man’s seemingly harmless morning routine with his squirrel-chasing dog turns into a moral reckoning when a stranger calls his attention to the visible fear of the little mammals.

Casting for:
PARKGOER - an active member of the community who prides themselves on being respectful and ethical. A believer of "see something, say something", is never afraid to be the bold one to stick out in the crowd for what's right. Grew up with pets and is an animal lover.

This is best suited for someone who is looking to collaborate, add to their reel/experience or just want to get involved in a fun, little shoot! Copy & credit

If interested, please email  zakbyrd@campjupiter.com with your reel and headshots (if available). Thank you so much!

items.text:
Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

Genau dafür stehen Christian Weiße und ich, Sandra Wötzel.

Wir sind nicht nur privat ein eingespieltes Team, sondern bringen auch vor der Kamera, im Content, am Set und in der Produktion eine gemeinsame Energie mit, die für Caster, Booker, Content Producer, Filmproduktionen, TV-Stationen und Sender sehr wertvoll sein kann.

Wenn Ihr uns gemeinsam bucht, bekommt Ihr nicht einfach zwei Personen. Ihr bekommt ein echtes Duo mit natürlicher Verbindung, Kameraerfahrung, Produktionsverständnis und der Fähigkeit, Situationen glaubwürdig, ruhig und nahbar wirken zu lassen.

Die Top 5 Effekte für Eure Produktion:

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model
items.summary:
Manchmal laufen zwei Menschen erst aneinander vorbei, bis sie merken, dass genau dort die stärkste Szene entsteht, wo sie sich wiederfinden.

Genau dafür stehen Christian Weiße und ich, Sandra Wötzel.

Wir sind nicht nur privat ein eingespieltes Team, sondern bringen auch vor der Kamera, im Content, am Set und in der Produktion eine gemeinsame Energie mit, die für Caster, Booker, Content Producer, Filmproduktionen, TV-Stationen und Sender sehr wertvoll sein kann.

Wenn Ihr uns gemeinsam bucht, bekommt Ihr nicht einfach zwei Personen. Ihr bekommt ein echtes Duo mit natürlicher Verbindung, Kameraerfahrung, Produktionsverständnis und der Fähigkeit, Situationen glaubwürdig, ruhig und nahbar wirken zu lassen.

Die Top 5 Effekte für Eure Produktion:

1. Echte Chemie statt gespielter Nähe
Unsere Verbindung ist nicht konstruiert. Sie ist da. Das spart Inszenierungsaufwand und schafft glaubwürdige Bilder.

2. Zwei Perspektiven, ein gemeinsamer Rhythmus
Christian bringt als erfahrener Filmproduzent, Content Creator und Kameramann den Blick für Bild, Timing und Wirkung mit. Ich bringe Präsenz, Natürlichkeit, Social Media Gefühl und emotionale Lesbarkeit vor der Kamera ein.

3. Weniger Reibung am Set
Wir kennen Abläufe, arbeiten zuverlässig, pünktlich, teamfähig und können uns schnell auf Tonalität, Regieanweisungen und Produktionslogik einstellen.

4. Mehr Einsatzmöglichkeiten
Ob Social Ad, UGC, TV, Fiction, Werbung, Paarrolle, Alltagsszene, Interview, Moderation, Reaction, Familienmoment oder Content-Serie, wir können einzeln oder gemeinsam gedacht werden.

5. Mehr Story in einem Booking
Unser Zusammenspiel liefert sofort erzählerische Tiefe. Begegnung, Nähe, Distanz, Wiederfinden, Vertrauen, Humor, Alltag und Emotion entstehen bei uns nicht künstlich, sondern aus echter Erfahrung.

Dieses Video ist für mich deshalb mehr als ein schöner Moment. Es ist ein Sinnbild für alle, die uns vielleicht bisher nur einzeln gesehen haben und jetzt erkennen dürfen, was möglich wird, wenn man Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel gemeinsam trifft, bucht und kreativ einsetzt.

Einmal buchen, zwei engagierte Menschen gewinnen. 

Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße

items.text:
Why Working with Local Filmmakers Is Vital for Emerging Actors
If you’re developing as an actor, it’s easy to focus on stage work, monologues, and agency showcases. But some of the fastest growth happens off the stage and in rooms you’ve never heard of, usually with a local filmmaker holding a camera and a coffee.

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/emma-turner-259525a6_acting-filmmaking-emergingactors-ugcPost-7462782694259605506-501M?utm_source=social_share_send&utm_medium=ios_app&rcm=ACoAABaAoSUBBvm3Us-PYfW-gV6d89gl5GDChy4&utm_campaign=copy_link

items.text:
Creative Black Cinema is CASTING actors and live band musicians ready to bring the culture, energy, emotion, and soul of Sunday dinner to life. 🔥

Inspired by the classic feeling of Soul Food, this live stage play experience blends powerful storytelling, family drama, comedy, love, and LIVE music into one unforgettable production.

We’re looking for:
🎬 Strong actors with personality, emotion, and stage presence
🎹 Live band musicians who can bring warmth, soul, gospel, R&B, jazz, and feel-good Black music energy to the experience

From Big Mama’s table to family secrets, laughter, heartbreak, and healing…
this production is about FAMILY, CULTURE, and SOUL. 🍽️✨

📍 Casting in Raleigh & Charlotte
🎤 Weekly Virtual Rehearsals
🎭 Live Stage Play + Live Band Experience

This isn’t just a showcase.
It’s a story our community will feel.

#SoulFoodStagePlay #CastingCall #BlackTheater #ActorsWanted #LiveBandExperience

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text: bongoproductions.com

sharedPost.text:
Continue your acting training at bongoproductions today!! 🎭

Truth Is Always Original

"Good acting, on the contrary [to imitative bad acting], like good writing, is remarkable for its individuality. It charms by its truth; and truth is always original."

George Henry Lewes, On Actors and the Art of Acting, 1875

Sign up for any of the 3 steps our comprehensive CERTIFICATE PROGRAM!!

STEP 1: PRIVATE COACHING - 6x1hr 
sessions
Learn or re-enforce the essentials, with trusted analysis techniques and direction, we go deep. We prepare and tape four contrasting monologues.

STEP 2: SEMIPRIVATE, SCENE-STUDY, OPTION 2: 3x2hr sessions.
I partner you, we review and apply the preparation techniques from Step 1. We tape 2 scenes with playback, notes and direction, with a focus on on-camera technique - living the scene!
Add to your reel!

STEP 2, 2nd OPTION: Thursday Night SCENE STUDY CLASS
A challenging and inspirational class applying fundamental analysis to compelling scenes. Each actor prepares and tapes 2 scenes, with coaching and using 2 cameras. Perfect for beginners to build a stable foundation and working professionals to sharpen acting tools, with a playful vibe.
NEW DATES FOR JUNE: 4th, 11th, 18th, 25th

STEP 3: THE SUCCESSFUL AUDITIONS WORKSHOP - 2 days
It's all about auditioning plus SELF-TAPE AUDITIONS, for commercials and film and TV series, we tape your 2 auditions, with critique, coaching, direction and demonstration.
JULY: 11th & 12th

Professional coaching, with Michael Caruana, at bongo productions, trusted since 1996!

For more contact us at:
(416) 294-3754
or,
www.bongoproductions.com to book a FREE consultation with Michael!

bongo productions is a proud member of AACE! (Association of Acting Coaches and Educators)

Michael offers a professional training space for actors who want depth, confidence, craft, and community. Reach out for a consultation with Michael at bongoproductions.com, or sign up now!'

items.text: Friendly tip - As a parent of three child actors (7, 13,17) we recently bought the book ‘Raising a Star’ from Amazon and found it was really useful and it answered loads of questions we had about how to give them the best start. All three of them now have agents and all of them have booked jobs this year.  I think it is definitely worth a look as it was only about $10 !  It is by Lily Thompson, who also has a really good self tape guide.

items.text:
In case anyone has seen the concerning article on Deadline.com about the questionable practices of a well-known agent, I wanted to share the blog of Sarah Hunt. Sarah is a highly ethical agent who is actively campaigning for stronger standards and greater accountability within the industry. It’s a really good example of how representation should be approached — thoughtful, professional and genuinely supportive of young actors and their families.

www.thehuntacademy.co.uk/the-hunt-for-talent/
items.title: The Hunt For Talent – The Hunt Academy For Young Actors

*Casting-friendly, authentic natural light headshots that look and feel like you.*
* Shot by an agency-endorsed photographer with years of experience working with actors, dancers and models, who will provide support and direction to bring out your best.

Headshots that show who you are and also the range of who you can be.

I specialise in expression-led, casting-ready headshots that read instantly on Spotlight and other casting platforms. 

I can come with my studio to you and shoot in the comfort of your home (or a place near you). You’re also welcome in my studio in Grantham, Lincolnshire.

Feel free to reach out via DM or via:

https://www.CaptivatingHeadshots.co.uk

items.text:
East Midlands Headshots
Hi I’m Jane from Beau-Louise Photography an East Midlands Headshot photographer now taking bookings for July/August. (Some weekday availability through June).

I advise on styling and what outfits work best for each look. Between your own wardrobe and my clothes rail we’ll create the perfect look for each look. I can also help with hairstyles if required. 

With 11 years experience of the industry working alongside Casting directors, Producers, Film makers & Agency owners, I know what is required to create stand out images. I am also Spotlight, Tagmin & Agency approved, I also have an enhanced DBS certificate and Chaperone Licence. 

18+ Packages from £80 (under 18’s from £50)For more information please see my Headshot portfolio on my website below. 

https://www.beau-louisephotography.co.uk/actor-headshots/

#actorheadshots #spotlight #headshotphotographer #eastmidlands #nottingham

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — CHARLIE KIRK LOOK ALIKE NEEDED**

Seeking a 31 years old white male actor/model to fill the role of Charlie Kirk for upcoming campus event at UCLA.

NON UNION.

**Talent Specs:**
* Male
* White
* Approx. 31 year old look
* Height: 6'1" and above
* Small, clean-cut face
* Able to reference statistics quickly
* Prior acting/modeling experience preferred but not required

**Project Details:**
* Paid opportunity ($1k for full day plus rehearsal day)
* Professional production environment on college campus
* Location: UCLA main campus

Please submit in comments:
* Recent headshots/photos
* Resume or relevant experience (if available)
* Availability in late August

Submissions posted below will be followed up with via private message.

Looking for reliable, professional talent with strong in-person presence. 

NON UNION.

items.text:
We’re currently looking for a Script Supervisor to join our team for an upcoming reality TV production, Final Act.

Filming Dates & Locations:

* June 13 – Lakeland, FL
* June 14 – Tampa, FL

Paid Position: $50/day

We’re seeking someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and able to track continuity, notes, and production flow in a fast-paced environment.

Opportunity:
This is a great chance to gain hands-on experience on an active set and be part of a growing independent production.

Additional Availability:
We are also looking for someone who may be available after June to help us continue and complete production.

Ideal Candidates:

* Experience in script supervision (preferred but not required)
* Strong attention to detail
* Reliable and professional
* Passion for film/TV production

Apply here:
https://forms.gle/1C9VLEFVJkvuhhj5A

items.text:
Whether you’re new to acting or already training, this class is built to push you further.

Learn from veteran actress **Raquel Gardner**, who also worked as a **manager** and **casting professional** and understands what actually helps actors stand out and get cast.

This 8-session intensive focuses on:
• Confidence under pressure
• Emotional access & authenticity
• Stronger scene work
• Real presence and communication
• Audition awareness and industry insight

If you’ve ever wanted to act, grow creatively, or break out of your comfort zone, this is your sign.

**Starting May 26, 2026**
7–10 PM • Once a week
**📍303 Studios, Encino**

Limited spots available.

Looking for actors & triple threat performers- for musical/theatre/film/tv castings

items.text:
Ever wonder how much child actors make for a quick set day? 👀🎬

We drove up to LA from San Diego and were there less than an hour and a half total.

That amount is AFTER taxes, Coogan account contributions, and agency fees were already taken out.

Honestly, it still surprises me compared to what I made at my first job.
Would you have guessed it would be more or less? 👀

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ticket stub and text

topComments.text: Depends. My kid has made this for a full day and sometimes for a half day. It all depends on what company it is for and what her role is.
Theatrical or commercial?  Union or non union? Those all come into play. It can be even higher than that.
