items.text:
🎭 THE METHOD THAT LEAD ME TO BOOK NETFLIX AND FEATURE FILM ROLES
After speaking to hundreds of actors, I keep hearing the same thing:

You sit in class for hours…
but only get 15–20 minutes actually working.

You bounce between different teachers, all with different methods.

Then you get notes like:
“Make it more believable.”
“Be more truthful.”
“Make stronger choices.”

…but no one really explains HOW to do that.

No clear exercises.
No actual technique you can repeat.
No real way to track improvement.

So you leave class overthinking and confused about how to actually get better.

Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and LEAD roles in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on ONCE UPON A TIME.

Acting is an incredibly competitive industry, and honestly, I see it a lot like professional sport.

Athletes don’t just play games. They train specific skills over and over so that when it’s time to compete, they have an edge.

Acting should be no different.

That’s why I created my groundbreaking acting program containing all the tools that have led to my success booking work.

🎬 1-hour private Zoom sessions.

The outcome:
An actor who is confident embodying a variety of characters and who can deliver emotionally impactful performances consistently leading to an actor who BOOKS WORK.

If this resonates with you, comment ACTING below or better yet, send me a DM 🤗

items.text:
CVS Health Services Customers Testimonial Casting
[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)
* Has CVS had a significant, positive impact on your health / life?
* Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail?
* Have you benefited from any CVS health services such as pharmacy deliveries, Minute Clinic mental health services, women's health services, etc?
* Do you have a story of how CVS has helped you along your health journey?

If you answered "yes" to any of these questions, then we want to hear from you! *(All selected talent will be compensated.)*

CVS and Edelman are looking for real people across the country to share their stories on how the different CVS health services have played an important, emotional, or memorable role in their health journey. These empowering testimonial videos will share stories of how CVS, CVS Pharmacy, Signify Health, MinuteClinic, CVS Specialty Pharmacy, etc. have helped everyone from college students to caregivers to cancer survivors to people who just love CVS. Whether you shop at CVS regularly, have visited the MinuteClinic, relied on the Specialty Pharmacy, or benefited from preventive screenings offered at a CVS location - we want to hear from you. 

*Selected candidates will take part in a filmed interview in late May / early June, where they will discuss how CVS is a part of their life.*

**If you are interested in being considered for this project, please fill out our casting application at **[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)** or email us directly at casting@pairedupmedia.com**

If you answered "YES" to any of these questions, we want to hear from you! CASTING@PAIREDUPMEDIA.COM PAIRED + UP MEDIA'

AUDITION NOTICE !! - TRUE WEST
Playbox Productions is excited to announce:

**TRUE WEST**
**by Sam Shepard**

Directed by **Samuel G.C. Muñoz**

**IN-PERSON AUDITIONS:**
Sunday, June 14, 2026
Starting at 9:00AM

**LOCATION:**
2820 Smallman Street
Pittsburgh, PA 15222

**AUDITION REQUIREMENTS:**
• Prepare TWO contrasting 1-minute monologues (Dark comedy preferred)
• Bring headshot & resume

**CALLBACKS:**
Wednesday, June 17 at 10:00AM
(Same location)
*Please make sure you are available for callbacks if auditioning.

**NOTE:** To be considered, you MUST:
• Fill out the Google Form (Link in Bio)
• Book an audition slot through the True West Auditions page link
If you do not reserve a time-slot, you will NOT have an audition appointment.

**PERFORMANCE DATES:**
September 24 – October 4, 2026
(10 Performances Over Two Weekends)

**Three Stories Theater**
937 Liberty Ave
Pittsburgh, PA

**COMPENSATION:**
All roles are paid. Stipends provided. (based on overall production performance) 

**Questions or scheduling conflicts?**
Email: playboxpgh@gmail.com
https://playboxproductions.com

**NOTE:** We are still looking for a few Stage Management production members to join the team, if that is any interest to you please email us ASAP: **playboxpgh@gmail.com**

**Tickets @** https://playbox.ticketspice.com/true-west

Presented by PLAYBOX Productions in partnership with the Pittsburgh Cultural Trust.

items.text: Now Casting! Non Union Women, late 40's to mid 60's of Middle Eastern descent who have or can do an accent from the Middle Eastern region (Syrian, Turkish, Armenian, Lebanese, Iraqi, Kuwaiti, Iranian/Persian, Jordanian, Omani, Yemeni, Israeli, Palestinian, Egyptian, Qatari, Saudi) for a video that will be a part of a museum exhibit about work and culture. Shoots in early July and pays $500 for a half day (4-5 hours). To submit email your resume and current photo to submissions@asylumcasting.com!

items.text:
👑 WOW… WHAT A RESPONSE! 👑

We have had a HUGE amount of interest for our Six Queens showcase performance for Majestic Academy of Performing Arts and not just students from our academy ✨

Thank you so much to everyone who has messaged, shared the post and shown interest already! *Please see all details on poster*

*The song you must sing MUST BE from SIX along with an introduction*

Please understand we can not answer multiple questions, all information is in the poster! 

Please note:
This is for our Festival Showcase Performance and not a full production of Six.

If you are not successful this time, please do not be discouraged 💜 We will also be casting for future showcase performances and building TWO performance teams for future events, competitions and opportunities.

Weekly training and rehearsals will take place in Chester ✨
We can’t wait to see all of your auditions Queens 👑

#Six #PerformingArts #MusicalTheatre #StageSchool #SixthForm

items.text:
🎬 PILNIE SZUKAMY AKTORA 🎬

Na jutro (25.05) poszukujemy aktora w wieku około 25–30 lat do udziału w etiudzie studenckiej.

Warszawa
Godziny zdjęć: 17:00–21:00
Rola męska

Projekt non-profit, ale zapewniamy:
zwrot kosztów dojazdu,
materiały do portfolio/showreela, ciepły posiłek 

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany lub znasz kogoś, kto mógłby pomóc, napisz wiadomość prywatną jak najszybciej. Będziemy wdzięczni za udostępnienia!

items.text:
!!! UWAGA !!! PILNE !!! WARSZAWA !!! GLINIARZE !!!

Do serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję MAMY Z DZIECKIEM do ról:

1. Wiktoria Tylicz (33) – słabo wykształcona pracownica fizyczna, uzależniona od narkotyków. Jej praca jest zbyt nisko płatna, aby nabyć je w pożądanej ilości. Próbuje zdobyć pieniądze nielegalnie, ale ma wyrzuty sumienia.

Data: 01. czerwca
Stawka: 500 zł netto

2.Jaś Kolski (2) – syn Norberta i Adeli, drobny.

Daty: 01., 02. i 05. czerwca
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Oraz informacje o dziecku:
1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Zdjęcie 

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

sharedPost.text:
Sesja zdjęciowej dla klienta z branży eventowo - biznesowej! Poszukujemy dzieci:

🔹 Dziewczynki, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/7dade83ff01142b4ae0a848c8c136b88

🔹 Chłopcy, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/46ba1a3b82f24c3db879179f2203a199

📍 Termin zdjęć: 5 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne

💰 Stawka: 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:
Otwarte, śmiałe. Proszę o zdjęcia z uśmiechem, w ruchu, podczas zabawy. Link z wizytówką będzie dodatkowym atutem.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez linki zamieszczone pod nazwą roli. W razie dodatkowych pytań kontakt na: sky.zgloszenie@gmail.com

❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY SZUKA UCZESTNIKÓW Lubisz gotować? Zgłoś się do nowego programu kulinarnego! Szukamy osób solo oraz duetów- rodzin, par, rodzeństwa, przyjaciół, babć wnukami wszystkich, którzy p prostu uwielbiają gotować. Nie trzeba być profesjonalnym kucharzem. Liczy się pasja do gotowania, osobowość pomysł na siebie. Wyślij swoje imię nazwisko wraz numerem telefonu na adres: zuzanna.kasterka@rochstar.tv កណធធធាវាាស្ស្ស Na uczestników czekają nagrody Czekamy na Was!'

sharedPost.text:
🐈‍⬛💰Pamiętasz emocje, gdy cała Polska wstrzymywała oddech przy otwieraniu bramek? WRACAMY! Reaktywujemy kultowe show
 „IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ” i szukamy właśnie Ciebie! 📺✨#BawSięiWygrywaj 

Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:
• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡
• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡
• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!
•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:
• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.
• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ (wymagany język polski). Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

🎭 EXTRA: Im bardziej szalony strój, tym lepiej! Przebierz się za dinozaura, policjanta, albo załóż najbardziej kolorowe ciuchy, jakie masz w szafie. Zróbmy show, o którym będzie głośno! 🦖🎨

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Nie zwlekaj, miejsca w studio znikają szybciej niż nagrody z bramek!
Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL
Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ
W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

sharedPost.text:
𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗮𝘁 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻: Belly Massage for Women & FLINTA*
​
The belly is one of the most emotionally and physically charged areas of the body — connected to stress, digestion, menstruation, hormones, emotions, vulnerability, and nervous system regulation.
​
Yet it’s also an area many people disconnect from, tense, hide, or ignore.
​
This treatment focuses exactly there: through integrative bodywork, belly massage, and nervous system-focused touch.
​
A powerful journey back to your center.
​
📍 In Berlin-Kreuzberg
​

sharedPost.text:
1200 Jahre Niederkalbach — Cinematic Homeland Orchestra | Urheberrechtsfreie Musik | Keine Content ID

Tauchen Sie ein in die emotionale und zeitlose Welt von „1200 Jahre Niederkalbach“ von Didier Junk – eine monumentale, cineastische Orchesterreise durch Erinnerungen, Heimat, Generationen, das Dorfleben, Kirchenglocken, Wälder, Felder und 1200 Jahre Menschheitsgeschichte.

Diese Musik eignet sich für:
Dorfjubiläen
Produktionen über europäische Landschaften
Familiengeschichtsvideos
dramatisches kulturelles Storytelling
cineastische Rückblenden
historische Atmosphäre-Projekte
emotionale Orchesterfilme

„1200 Jahre Niederkalbach“ verwandelt Erinnerung, Tradition und menschliche Verbundenheit in ein gigantisches cineastisches Orchestererlebnis voller Wärme, Nostalgie und historischer Erhabenheit.

Diese Musikbibliothek steht Creatoren KOSTENLOS zur Verfügung, ohne Content-ID-Ansprüche für die Standardnutzung auf YouTube und in sozialen Medien.

Wenn Sie:
exklusive Original-Tracks
Premium-Kinoversionen
kommerzielle Lizenzen
Extended Editions
Soundtrack-Kollektionen nur für Mitglieder
direkte Unterstützung für den Komponisten wünschen,

ziehen Sie bitte eine Kanalmitgliedschaft bei Didier Junk in Betracht.

Perfekt für:
Heimatatmosphäre • Historisches Orchester • Wall Of Sound • Emotionale Instrumentalmusik • Deutsche Landschaft • Historisches Gedächtnis • Cineastisches Storytelling • Warme Orchestermusik • Dorfjubiläum • Monumentale Emotionen

#Niederkalbach #Filmmusik #WallOfSound #EpischesOrchester #Heimatmusik #HistorischeMusik #EmotionalesOrchester #Instrumentalmusik #DeutscheLandschaft #Dorfatmosphäre #CineastischesStorytelling #UrheberrechtsfreieMusik #KostenloseMusik #KeineContentID #HistorischeAtmosphäre #EmotionaleMusik #DidierJunk #Orchestermusik #EuropäischeGeschichte #WarmeFilmmusik

sharedPost.text:
🎤 Riffs & Runs – neue Podcastfolge ist da!
Kennst Du diesen Gänsehautmoment, wenn die Band stoppt und die Sängerin alles aus dem letzten Ton herausholt? Diese atemberaubenden, schnellen Melodieläufe – das sind Vocal Riffs & Runs. 🎤✨
In meiner neuen Podcastfolge erkläre ich, was dahintersteckt – und gebe Dir ein paar einfache Übungen mit, damit Du erste Schritte in Richtung Riffs & Runs machen kannst. 🎵
👉 Link in Bio oder direkt hier: https://singasong-behappy.de/podcast-fur-gesang-und-stimme/
Oder auf Spotify, Apple Podcasts & überall, wo es Podcasts gibt. 🎧

items.text:
CASTING CALL — SHORT FILM

For an independent short film shooting near Stuttgart, we are looking for an elderly woman (75–90 years old) for a supporting role:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Woman · 75–90 years old
• Russian required
• German / English not important
• Face that tells a story

Character:
An elderly woman living in Germany the same way she used to live in the USSR. Strict but fair, and eager to help others by passing on traditions.

Logline:
A sleep-deprived daughter of Russian immigrants, struggling with lifelong sleep paralysis, discovers a new technique to escape her episodes.

Details:
• Preferably based near Stuttgart
• Unpaid / no-budget production
• Transportation & meals covered
• 1 shooting day around June 14th (exact date TBD)

Apply here:

[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

———  

CASTING CALL — KURZFILM 

Für einen unabhängigen Kurzfilm im Raum Stuttgart suchen wir eine ältere Frau (75–90 Jahre) für eine Nebenrolle:

LUDMILLA IVANOVNA / LJUDA
• Frau · 75–90 Jahre alt
• Russisch erforderlich
• Deutsch / Englisch nicht wichtig
• Gesicht, das eine Geschichte erzählt

Charakter:
Ältere Frau, die in Deutschland noch immer so lebt wie früher in der UdSSR. Streng, aber fair und bemüht, Menschen durch die Weitergabe ihrer Traditionen zu helfen.

Logline:
Eine schlaflose Tochter russischer Immigrant:innen, die ihr ganzes Leben unter Schlafparalysen leidet, entdeckt eine neue Methode, sich daraus zu befreien.

Infos:
• Idealerweise aus dem Raum Stuttgart
• Unbezahlt / No-Budget-Produktion
• Anreise & Verpflegung werden übernommen
• 1 Drehtag um den 14. Juni (genaues Datum folgt)

Bewerbung an:
[dreamwalking.film@gmail.com](mailto:dreamwalking.film@gmail.com)

Kære Alle. 

Vi søger akut statister til en reklamefilm, der filmes senere i dag. Vi filmer under Bispebuen i København fra klokken 19.30 - 21.00 

Vi søger både drenge og piger i alderen 15-17 år. Forældre/værge behøver ikke at deltage i optagelserne, men det er vigtigt at de skriver under på statistkontrakten. 

Hvis du eller dit barn er interesserede, så send gerne en SMS med et billede til vores koordinator Gül på følgende nummer: 42 53 23 22. 
Hun vil også kunne fortælle mere om optagelserne.

Jobbet er lønnet!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – MORBID FAMILY DRAMA
We are seeking dedicated, emotionally fearless actors for an upcoming theatre production exploring themes of family, control, identity, and inherited trauma.

This is an intense ensemble-driven piece that requires performers willing to fully immerse themselves in challenging material and emotionally demanding scenes.

**PRODUCTION DETAILS**
* **Project Duration:** 1 month
* **Rehearsals:** 3 times per week
* **Deadline to Apply:** 1st June
* **Compensation:** Unpaid

You will receive full theatrical production experience; Will be professionally filmed. Can be material for showreel use; Opportunity to collaborate within an ensemble-driven process.

**Presented in theatre, for festival, in Stratford, 9th of July**

**THE PROJECT (HOLZ, A FAMILY PARABLE)**

Trapped together for a single weekend, a fractured family is forced to confront the truths they have spent years avoiding. As hours turn into days, buried resentments and painful secrets rise to the surface, exposing wounds shaped by control, legacy, and the pressure of maintaining a “pure” bloodline.

This production will involve emotionally heavy subject matter and a demanding rehearsal process. We are looking for committed collaborators ready to engage deeply with the work and support one another throughout the process.

**ROLES AVAILABLE**

**Seeking 4 lead actors- Others already cast**

***Caucasian / British / English-speaking performers***

FATHER (35-50) Lives in a state of soft denial, drifting through life on routine and optimism. Family is the only thing that gives him purpose, and he clings desperately to it. He idolises his own father and constantly seeks approval from his wife, unaware of how little control he truly has. Beneath his efforts to “keep the peace,” he hides a serious diagnosis that no one else in the family knows about.

MOTHER (35-50) The architect of the household’s fragile stability. She maintains order through silence, control, and emotional precision. If someone no longer fits into her world, she removes them without hesitation. What appears cold is, to her, survival. Beneath the surface lies a dead marriage, forbidden desires, and a secret capable of destroying the family entirely.

SISTER (18-25) A force of frustration and suppressed rage. She has spent her life being misunderstood, dismissed, and pushed into identities she never chose. Angry at the family, the house, and the expectations placed upon her, she longs to escape — but refuses to be seen as weak. Though her brother wants to save her, she is determined to prove she can survive on her own.

SON (18-22) The youngest, and seemingly the least damaged by the family’s dysfunction. Sensitive, emotional, and endlessly curious, he struggles to understand the heaviness surrounding him. He wants to help everyone and keep the family together, but his softness makes him vulnerable in a household that doesn’t know how to protect gentleness.

**HOW TO APPLY**

Please submit/send DM:
* Headshot
* CV
* Brief introduction

We look forward to hearing from you.

You surely cant expect actors to work for a month for free ?
No pay no pay - your project pay your actors! 
🚩

🚩

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – ROMEO AND JULIET (Kathmandu Valley | Lambeth Fringe 2026) 🎭
We are casting local performers based in Nepal (Kathmandu Valley) for a bold new stage adaptation of Romeo and Juliet, heading to Lambeth Fringe 2026 (UK).

This is a contemporary, cross-cultural production that reimagines Shakespeare through movement, text, and grounded performance. We are looking for committed, expressive actors who are excited to work collaboratively and bring fresh energy to a classic story.

Roles available:

Romeo, Juliet, Mercutio, Tybalt, Friar Laurence, Nurse, and ensemble performers.

Location: Kathmandu Valley (rehearsals)

Festival: Lambeth Fringe 2026, London (UK tour)

Eligibility: Open to Nepal-based performers only

📩 To apply:

Send your CV, headshot, and a short self-tape (1–2 minutes introducing yourself and/or performing Shakespeare) to:

yuensunyeefilms@gmail.com

Subject line: R&J Casting – [Your Name] – Role Applying For

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted with audition details.

A timeless story, retold from Kathmandu to London.

items.text:
Enrolment is now open for our next block of online screen acting classes! 

Huge thank you to Arlo for this wonderful review on his experience on the course! 💫

📆 Monday 8th June - Monday 29th June 
🌟 For ages 8 - 13 years 
⏰ 90 minute sessions every Monday evening 
🌟 4 week block for £40 
📝 Limited group numbers 

🎬 The sessions are fun and engaging TV & Screen acting focused covering scene analysis, natural performance, self tape & screen technique, developing imagination through improv, exploring emotions in a safe environment and much more! 

Contact us today for more information or to secure a place for your child! 

📧 Classes@mcaa.co.uk 

https://cherrypipsacting.co.uk/

items.summary:
Enrolment is now open for our next block of online screen acting classes! 

Huge thank you to Arlo for this wonderful review on his experience on the course! 💫

📆 Monday 8th June - Monday 29th June 
🌟 For ages 8 - 13 years 
⏰ 90 minute sessions every Monday evening 
🌟 4 week block for £40 
📝 Limited group numbers 

🎬 The sessions are fun and engaging TV & Screen acting focused covering scene analysis, natural performance, self tape & screen technique, developing imagination through improv, exploring emotions in a safe environment and much more! 

Contact us today for more information or to secure a place for your child! 

📧 Classes@mcaa.co.uk 

https://cherrypipsacting.co.uk/
items.title: Enrolment is now open for our next block of online screen acting classes!

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – ROMEO AND JULIET (Kathmandu Valley | Lambeth Fringe 2026) 🎭
We are casting local performers based in Nepal (Kathmandu Valley) for a bold new stage adaptation of Romeo and Juliet, heading to Lambeth Fringe 2026 (UK).

This is a contemporary, cross-cultural production that reimagines Shakespeare through movement, text, and grounded performance. We are looking for committed, expressive actors who are excited to work collaboratively and bring fresh energy to a classic story.

Roles available:

Romeo, Juliet, Mercutio, Tybalt, Friar Laurence, Nurse, and ensemble performers.

Location: Kathmandu Valley (rehearsals)

Festival: Lambeth Fringe 2026, London (UK tour)

Eligibility: Open to Nepal-based performers only

📩 To apply:

Send your CV, headshot, and a short self-tape (1–2 minutes introducing yourself and/or performing Shakespeare) to:

yuensunyeefilms@gmail.com

Subject line: R&J Casting – [Your Name] – Role Applying For

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted with audition details.

A timeless story, retold from Kathmandu to London.

✨ Safe & supportive environment

items.text:
CASTING CALL — TV HOSTSNew Lifestyle & House Hunting Television Series
**LOS ANGELES BASED**

A major new lifestyle / house-hunting television series is now casting experienced on-camera hosts based in Los Angeles.

We are searching for a charismatic **male or female host**, aged approximately **30–45**, with a polished on-screen presence and strong television experience.

This is a professionally produced property and lifestyle series that will include:

* House hunting
* Property walkthroughs
* Lifestyle storytelling
* Some travel

We are looking for talent who can confidently connect with viewers while demonstrating genuine knowledge and passion for:

* Real estate
* Home design
* Architecture
* Lifestyle trends
* Luxury living

**IDEAL CANDIDATES WILL HAVE:**

* Proven experience hosting television programs or digital series
* Strong presenting and interviewing skills
* Professional, mature and glamorous on-camera presence
* Ability to improvise naturally on camera
* Excellent communication and storytelling ability
* Knowledge of property, interiors and home design
* Availability for one-day episode shoots

**PROJECT DETAILS:**

* Non-union
* Low per-episode hosting fee
* Each episode filmed in one shoot day
* Some travel may be required

**TO APPLY:**

Please email the following:

* Recent headshot/photos
* Resume or hosting credits
* Links to hosting reel or previous television work
* A short self-tape introducing yourself and explaining:
   * Your hosting experience
   * Your interest in property and home design
   * Why you would be perfect for this series

**SELF-TAPE GUIDELINES:**

Please keep your video under 2 minutes and film in a bright, quiet location.

If possible, include a short walkthrough of a stylish room, property, or home space while presenting to camera.

**SEND SUBMISSIONS TO:**

**Casting Director**

[info@abode-ent.com](mailto:info@abode-ent.com)  

Subject Line:

**HOUSE HUNTING HOST CASTING – YOUR NAME**

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

items.text:
Hey everyone, my name is Elias from 2 Liters Shady Films and I just released a new trailer for my indie horror feature film, Mocos. If you have a few minutes of your time, I’d really appreciate you checking it out.

I’m an independent filmmaker currently writing, editing, and filming the project myself, so every view, like, comment, and share truly goes a long way in supporting indie creators like me. 

I’m still actively filming and looking for anyone interested in getting involved with the feature film. No experience is necessary, and I have a ton of remote self-film scenes available that can be done right from the comfort of your own home using my detailed instructions.

If interested, feel free to message me directly or email me at mocosthemovie@gmail.com

Thank you again for the support and for helping independent horror continue to grow!

https://youtu.be/UcvK93KTtzY?si=_KVtQ_4leSnZgkw3
